name: Gitlab Inc.
summary: PART I Overview GitLab is the intelligent orchestration platform for DevSecOps, where software teams and their Artificial Intelligence (AI) agents stay in flow to ship software faster. Built with a unified data model, our platform brings together development, operations, Information Technology (IT), security, and business teams across the entire software development lifecycle to deliver better, more secure software faster.
